articles.title: Key inflation gauge jumps to 3-year high in latest sign of affordability challenges
articles.description: The Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation gauge rose to a new three-year high in May as gas prices peaked, a sign rising costs could pose political problems for President Trump as midterm elections near.

articles.title: Trump just told the DOJ to investigate the oil companies that spent $100 million getting him elected
articles.description: Crude prices are back to pre-war levels. Gas prices aren't. Now Trump's pointing fingers at his own biggest donors.

articles.title: Key inflation gauge jumps to 3-year high in latest sign of affordability challenges
articles.description: WASHINGTON — The Federal Reserve’s preferred inflation gauge rose to a new three-year high in May as gas prices peaked, a sign rising costs could pose political problems for President Donald Trump and his political party as midterm elections near.

articles.title: Bathinda petrol bomb attack case cracked, 2 arrested
articles.description: The Bathinda police, in a joint operation with the Counter Intelligence Wing, claimed to have cracked the petrol bomb attack on a homoeopathic clinic near the Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) office. Two youths have been arrested, while a third accused remains absconding. The National Investigation Agency (NIA) had also begun probing the case a day earlier.

articles.title: Man set ablaze over Rs 300 petrol dues in Gwalior; two arrested
articles.description: Gwalior: 26-year-old man set on fire over Rs 300 petrol dues; suffers 37% burns. Two arrested, one absconding; police probe CCTV and forensics.

articles.title: Joe Cordina charged with assault following Cardiff petrol station incident
articles.description: Former boxing world champion Joe Cordina has been charged with “assault and threatening a person with an offensive weapon” following an incident at a petrol station in Cardiff in February

articles.title: Survey shows gas-price pain rising even as economic confidence stabilizes
articles.description: Rising gas prices are dealing a major hit to household budgets, with most Americans admitting that high gas prices are severely squeezing their finances, according to a new poll.
